summary: Synthesized complete deliberation history: 9 proposals, 3 challenge rounds, 3 verdicts. UNANIMOUS CONSENSUS on Crewspace (TypeScript-native agent orchestration framework with visual platform, OSS-first strategy). All three agents converged after rigorous self-challenge. Final recommendation documented with honest revenue expectations ($100-200K ARR Year 1), tempered UX goals, phased execution plan (OSS M1-2 → Visual M3-4 → Templates M5-8 → Growth M9-12), and clear risk mitigation. Key convergence arguments: market demand proven (CrewAI 450M+ workflows), positioning unoccupied, OSS moat fits $0 budget, TypeScript gap is real. Alternative proposals eliminated (FlowCrew impossible at constraints, CrewEmbed unvalidated, AgentBench/AgentOps/CrewMarket are features not products). Decision gate at Month 2 (OSS validation), concurrent lean validation during build. Ready for GM final decision.
